hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight font-serif
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight font-serif
hierarchy.body: text-base lg:text-lg font-light leading-relaxed font-sans text-muted-foreground
hierarchy.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium font-sans text-primary-foreground

layout_strategy.spacing: Use generous spacing (py-24, py-32). Containers must have ample internal padding.
layout_strategy.alignment: Favor left-alignment for copy. Use optical alignment over geometric. Implement asymmetrical grids for image showcases.
layout_strategy.hero: A split layout or overlapping composition. Avoid generic centered text over a darkened image. Use a soft, elegant overlay if text is on an image.
layout_strategy.navigation: Sticky header with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/70 border-b border-[#D8D2CA]/50). Must contain links to Home, Shop, About, Contact.
layout_strategy.footer: Massive padding (py-20). Minimalist structure. MUST include 'Built by DH Website Services'.
layout_strategy.shop: Bento grid or asymmetrical showcase for the 3 sizes (7oz, 9oz, 12oz) since there is no standard cart. Prioritize high-quality imagery.

interaction_and_motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
interaction_and_motion.animations: Framer motion for subtle reveal-on-scroll (fade up and slow drift). Staggered entrances for lists and grids.
interaction_and_motion.buttons: Flat background with 1px border. On hover, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md. Always set text color explicitly.

pages.name: Home
pages.description: Introduction to GlowWithLucy. Hero section with emotional copy. Featured highlight of the bespoke process. CTA to view sizes.

pages.name: Shop
pages.description: Showcase of the three candle sizes: 7oz, 9oz, 12oz. Explains the contact-to-order approach. No cart functionality.

pages.name: About
pages.description: The story of the artisan, the candle-making process, the commitment to bespoke quality.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact form using Shadcn. Must include standard fields (Name, Email, Message) PLUS a specific field for 'Scent Preferences' or 'Candle Size & Scent Request'. Mentions email: lucyd789@sky.com.

contact_aesthetic.description: Artistic hand holding a uniquely shaped candle

specific_requirements: No e-commerce cart. The site uses a contact-to-order approach.
Contact form must have a field to request scent preferences.
Footer must have 'Built by DH Website Services'.
Logo text: 'GLOW WITH LUCY - CANDLE MAKING'. Background is #C4B9A7. Since no image is provided, style this as a clean text logo or simple SVG with the specified background.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on #C4B9A7 or #F9F8F6 meets WCAG AA standards. Use #2E2922 for primary text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
